arguments.name: There are no inputs for this script.

outputs.description: The total number of local rules analyzed. PANOS.UnusedRules.TotalPanoramaRulesAnalyzed The total number of rules pushed from Panorama analyzed.
outputs.name: PANOS.UnusedRules.TotalLocalRulesAnalyzed

outputs.description: PANOS.UnusedRules.UsedPanoramaRules.from_dg_name Name of the device group the rule is inherited from. PANOS.UnusedRules.UsedPanoramaRules.hostids_with_hits
outputs.name: Number

outputs.description: PANOS.UnusedRules.UsedPanoramaRules.hostnames_with_hits Hostnames of firewalls where this rule has hits. PANOS.UnusedRules.UsedPanoramaRules.hostids_with_zero_hits
outputs.name: Host IDs of firewalls where this rule has hits.

outputs.description: PANOS.UnusedRules.UsedPanoramaRules.hostnames_with_zero_hits Hostnames of firewalls where this rule has zero hits. PANOS.UnusedRules.UsedPanoramaRules.instanceName
outputs.name: Host IDs of firewalls where this rule has zero hits.

outputs.description: PANOS.UnusedRules.UsedPanoramaRules.name The name of the rule. PANOS.UnusedRules.UsedPanoramaRules.position
outputs.name: Name of the PAN-OS Integration Instance used to collect rule hitcount data.

outputs.description: PANOS.UnusedRules.UsedPanoramaRules.rulebase The rulebase where the rule is configured (e.g. "Security", "NAT", etc). PANOS.UnusedRules.UnusedLocalRules.activeHAPeer
outputs.name: The position of the rule within the Panorama device-group rulebase (pre-rulebase or post-rulebase).

outputs.description: PANOS.UnusedRules.UnusedLocalRules.hostid Host ID of the firewall where the rule is configured. PANOS.UnusedRules.UnusedLocalRules.hostname
outputs.name: If the firewall where this rule data comes from is in an HA pair, contains the hostid of the active device in the pair.

outputs.description: PANOS.UnusedRules.UnusedLocalRules.vsys The virtual system (vsys) where the rule is configured. PANOS.UnusedRules.UnusedLocalRules.instanceName
outputs.name: Hostname of the firewall where this rule is configured.

outputs.description: PANOS.UnusedRules.UnusedLocalRules.name The name of the rule. PANOS.UnusedRules.UnusedLocalRules.position
outputs.name: Name of the PAN-OS Integration Instance used to collect rule hitcount data.

outputs.description: PANOS.UnusedRules.UnusedLocalRules.rulebase The rulebase where the rule is configured (e.g. "Security", "NAT", etc). PANOS.UnusedRules.UnusedPanoramaRules.from_dg_name
outputs.name: The position of the rule within the Panorama device-group rulebase (pre-rulebase or post-rulebase).

outputs.description: PANOS.UnusedRules.UnusedPanoramaRules.instanceName Name of the PAN-OS Integration Instance used to collect rule hitcount data. PANOS.UnusedRules.UnusedPanoramaRules.name
outputs.name: The rulebase where the rule is configured (e.g. "Security", "NAT", etc).

outputs.description: PANOS.UnusedRules.UnusedPanoramaRules.position The position of the rule within the Panorama device-group rulebase (pre-rulebase or post-rulebase). PANOS.UnusedRules.UnusedPanoramaRules.rulebase
outputs.name: The name of the rule.
